description: Create Part3_LetraEngine.mqh - Ported from Letra 37's fixed-timeframe structure engine (f_se), physics engine (f_phys), Engine 1A lifecycle authority, and multi-TF fractal stack alignment. This provides the multi-timeframe wave analysis that feeds into the probability engines.
steps: Create Part3_LetraEngine.mqh at the repo root

Port the physics engine f_phys as ComputePhysics(): ATR, velocity (EMA of close-close[1],3), acceleration, convexity (jerk), convSmooth (EMA of convexity,3), efficiency (distance/path), displacement (range/ATR), bullImpulse/bearImpulse detection, bullMomDecay/bearMomDecay, convexity shift, velocity decay flags (vd70, vd50)

Port the fixed-TF structure engine f_se as ComputeStructureEngine(): internal physics, swing detection (pivothigh/pivotlow), pivot memory (last/prev), BOS/CHoCH detection (with buffer), impulse detection (high-low > ATR*mult), direction/lifecycle state machine (spawn on impulse or CHoCH flip), point4/invalidation/target calculation, monotonic phase state machine (0->13 states: expansion, pre-convexity, induction, liquidity, new high/low, transition, retracement, HTF flip, induction, liquidation, terminal, demand/supply return), wave progress/convexity maturity/model fit calculation, recursive transition tracking (Phase-2 CHoCH count), dominance transfer, compression index
Implement multi-TF instantiation: call ComputeStructureEngine for each of 6 fixed timeframes (M1/M3/M5/M15/H1/H4) using CopyRates + CopyBuffer approach, store results in array of LetraStructureResult
Port fractal stack alignment: count bull/bear across all 6 timeframes, compute fractalStackDir and fractalStackScore (max/6 * 100)
Port Engine 1A output: ie1a_currentPhase = M5 canonical phase string, ie1a_phaseConfidence from fractal context + model fit + wave progress
Port f_phaseStr() mapping phase codes to canonical lifecycle strings (14 phases)
Port the origin-based wave direction: f_waveDirByOrigin(origin, fallbackDir) = close > origin ? 1 : close < origin ? -1 : fallback
acceptance_criteria: Part3_LetraEngine.mqh exists with valid MQL5 syntax
Physics engine computes all derivatives correctly (vel/acc/convexity/efficiency/displacement)
Structure engine implements full lifecycle state machine with all 14 phases
Multi-TF instantiation retrieves data from 6 fixed timeframes
Fractal stack alignment produces direction and score
Engine 1A outputs canonical phase and confidence
verification: Read the file and verify the lifecycle state machine matches Letra 37's f_se logic
Verify physics calculations match the f_phys pattern
Verify all 14 phase strings are defined in the mapping function
findings: Part3_LetraEngine.mqh created at 811 lines. Contains: LetraInternalState struct (56 fields for per-TF persistent state), LetraPhysicsOutput struct (7 doubles + 8 bools), ComputePhysics() (full f_phys port: ATR, velocity EMA(3), acceleration, convexity/jerk, convSmooth EMA(3), efficiency, displacement, bull/bear impulse, momentum decay, convexity shift, vd70/vd50), ComputeStructureEngine() (full f_se port: internal physics, swing detection via IsPivotHighArr/IsPivotLowArr, pivot memory, BOS/CHoCH with buffer, impulse detection, direction/lifecycle state machine with spawn/flip, cycle tracking, monotonic 14-state phase machine with 3-dimension advancement conditions, live behavioral phase export, recursive transition tracking, dominance transfer, waveProgress/convexityMaturity/modelFit/compression computation, FRZ score, origin-based direction output), UpdateAllLetraEngines() (6 fixed TFs via CopyTFData, fractal stack dir/score), PhaseToString() (15 phases 0-14), WaveDirByOrigin(), GetEngine1APhase(), GetEngine1AConfidence(). Uses g_letraState[6] for persistent inter-tick state. All brackets/braces/parens verified balanced. No duplicate names with Part1/Part2.
